Language settings, font specifications, and Portuguese translations for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[lang_map.json](lang_map.json.md)**: Defines language settings and font specifications for Portuguese (pt_PT) in the Pebble firmware.
- **[tintin.po](tintin.po.md)**: Portuguese translation file for Pebble firmware, including UI messages and notifications.
